ConnectionCommon.docs: Fields shared by every connection strategy.

display_name.docs: Connection name shown in the login screen.
Connection name shown in the login screen.

__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    getConnection:
      path: /connections/{id}
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        name: GetConnectionRequest
        path-parameters:
          id: string
      response:
        docs: Success
        type: ConnectionResponse
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - path-parameters:
            id: id
          response:
            body:
              id: string
              name: string
              display_name: string
              options_auth0:
                tenant: tenant
              strategy: auth0
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml
types:
  ConnectionCommon:
    docs: Fields shared by every connection strategy.
    properties:
      id:
        type: string
        docs: The connection's identifier.
      name:
        type: string
        docs: The connection's display name.
      display_name:
        type: optional<string>
        docs: Connection name shown in the login screen.
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ConnectionResponse:
    discriminant:
      value: strategy
      context: data
    base-properties:
      id:
        type: string
        docs: The connection's identifier.
      name:
        type: string
        docs: The connection's display name.
      display_name:
        type: string
        docs: Connection name shown in the login screen.
    docs: Discriminated union of connection strategies.
    union:
      auth0: ConnectionResponseAuth0
      samlp: ConnectionResponseSamlp
      email: ConnectionResponseEmail
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ConnectionResponseAuth0OptionsAuth0:
    properties:
      tenant: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
    inline: true
  ConnectionResponseAuth0:
    docs: Auth0 strategy connection.
    properties:
      options_auth0: optional<ConnectionResponseAuth0OptionsAuth0>
    extends:
      - ConnectionCommon
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ConnectionResponseSamlpOptionsSamlp:
    properties:
      metadata_url: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
    inline: true
  ConnectionResponseSamlp:
    docs: SAML strategy connection.
    properties:
      options_samlp: optional<ConnectionResponseSamlpOptionsSamlp>
    extends:
      - ConnectionCommon
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ConnectionResponseEmailOptionsEmail:
    properties:
      from: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
    inline: true
  ConnectionResponseEmail:
    docs: Email strategy connection.
    properties:
      options_email: optional<ConnectionResponseEmailOptionsEmail>
    extends:
      - ConnectionCommon
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

contents.display-name: Lift shared allOf properties from oneOf variants
contents.name: api

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
